commands.review_summary:
The PR updates cron tool schema assertions and Codex prompt snapshots for nullable cron schema output, and adjusts a phone-control test Promise executor to satisfy lint.

PR surface: Tests +345. Total +345 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a PR patch review; the claimed CI failures are supported by the PR body and current check-run data, but I did not run tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed from this review; remaining work is ordinary maintainer CI and merge handling.

target.title: fix(ci): restore cron schema snapshots
target.body:
## Summary
- refreshes the affected Codex prompt snapshots against the provider-normalized cron tool schema
- keeps the cron runtime schema nullable so `null` clear values still reach cron patch normalization
- fixes the phone-control test lint regression from returning `setImmediate` inside a Promise executor

## Real behavior proof
- Behavior addressed: current PR CI was failing on `check-lint`, `check-additional-extension-bundled`, `checks-node-core-fast`, and `prompt:snapshots:check` because the cron prompt snapshots drifted and phone-control had a Promise-executor lint regression.
- Real environment tested: main-based OpenClaw gwt with shared repo `node_modules` symlink.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts`; `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`; `git diff --check`.
- Evidence after fix: targeted Vitest passed 3 files / 113 tests; oxlint exited 0; prompt snapshot check reported `Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).`; `git diff --check` exited 0.
- Observed result after fix: cron runtime nullable schema tests still pass, provider-normalized schema assertions pass, phone-control lint target passes, and generated prompt snapshots match the committed fixtures.
- What was not tested: full repo check; CI is running that broad proof on this PR.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.test.ts extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/phone-control/index.test.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.ts src/agents/tools/cron-tool.schema.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-prompt-snapshots.ts --check`
- `git diff --check`
